name: Torta Di Nocciole Con Panna
recipeInstructions:
1. PREHEAT OVEN TO 400°F.
2. Butter and flour an 8-inch cake pan.
3. Spread hazelnuts on a cookie sheet and toast in the oven for 5 minutes.
4. Remove the nuts and reduce the oven temperature to 350°F.
5. Grind the nuts in a blender or food processor to a fine meal.
6. Beat eggs and sugar together until pale yellow and creamy.
7. Mix in flour, baking powder, salt, and ground nuts.
8. Transfer batter to prepared pan and bake for 20-to-25 minutes,
until edges of the cake begin to pull away from the pan.
9. Cool on a rack and transfer to a plate.
10. Just before serving, whip cream to soft peaks and spread over top of cake.
